Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x808B "GETOFFMYGARDEN-7900-808B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Get Off my Garden!.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $7900 to copy a memory block down to $02A7 to $02FF that was placed there by the original loader.
